webpage_section.section_description: Second card list item containing an image section and text content section with heading, description, and CTA button

difference_1.element_description: Second card container (full card with image and text)
difference_1.computed_style_change: display: flex vs block; flex-direction: column vs row; border-radius: 8px vs 0px; width: 368px vs 1168px
difference_1.difference: The original second card is a vertical flex column at 368px width with 8px rounded corners and light blue background. The migrated version is a block element at full container width with no border radius. The layout changed from a single vertical card to a horizontal multi-card row.

difference_2.element_description: Card text content area with heading and CTA button
difference_2.difference: The text content area padding differs: original has uniform 20px padding, migrated has 0px top padding and 32px bottom padding.

difference_3.element_description: Card image showing wine bottles (original) vs man on beach (migrated)
difference_3.difference: The original image shows wine bottles while the migrated shows a different photo. The object-fit changed from 'cover' to 'fill'.
